title: Numb

earnings.assumptions: Estimate reflects global long-tail streaming, playlist persistence, and strong catalog replay inside 2000s rock and alternative listening.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label master ownership with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split among band writers and publishers
ownership.notes: Inferred current earnings range from streaming and catalog behavior.

meaning_summary: This song holds value through a recognizable core riff or chorus, strong emotional payoff, and steady replay.
revenue_drivers: Classic replay value and catalog streaming keep major rock songs relevant.
Cultural familiarity supports long-tail listener demand.
Sync placements and live-culture recognition help extend the song's revenue life.
